note: Most of these tie to V.I.PASSHOLDER Summer Days, which runs May 1 – July 31, 2026. Items marked "AP exclusive" require a valid Annual Pass at purchase. Availability is while supplies last and subject to change — worth double-checking day-of via My Disney Experience.

items.name: La Poutinerie — Québec: L'authentique & Spiced Apple Slushy
items.desc: New permanent-menu spot replacing Refreshment Port; poutine and a non-alcoholic frozen ginger-apple slushy.

items.name: Sunshine Seasons — new summer bowls
items.desc: Plant-Based Sofritas, Pork Carnitas, and Beef Barbacoa bowls, all cilantro-lime rice based.

items.name: Parisian Pebble Cold Brew
items.location: Joffrey's, EPCOT (part of AP Coffee Crawl)
items.desc: Fruity cereal-flavored cold brew with cream, whipped cream, and fruity cereal on top.

items.name: Summer Haze & Hibiscus Spritz
items.desc: Summer Haze (Fords Gin, St. Germain elderflower) and a non-alcoholic Hibiscus Spritz; souvenir glass upgrade available.

items.name: Carrot Cake Sundae
items.desc: Vanilla ice cream, caramel, roasted pecans, and carrot cake crumbs with a birthday-cake shell.

items.name: 7-Layer Bar
items.desc: Newly added bar-style dessert; not date-limited as of this writing.

items.name: Forbidden Mountain Cold Brew
items.desc: Cold brew with honey syrup, cream, whipped cream, and honey cereal.

items.name: Screen Time Swirl Float & Lilypad Lunch Box Tart
items.location: Woody's Lunch Box, Toy Story Land
items.desc: Toy Story 5 tie-in: vanilla soft-serve with Coca-Cola Zero Sugar, chocolate cookie crumbs, and a gummy frog; while supplies last.

items.name: Rockin' Cold Brew
items.desc: Chocolate peanut butter cold brew with cream and chocolate-PB puff cereal on top.

items.name: Iced Double Berry Matcha
items.location: Main Street Bakery (Starbucks) — also any WDW Starbucks
items.desc: Berry-mellowed matcha; not currently marked as a limited-time item.

items.name: Lucky Star Cold Brew
items.desc: Cold brew with toasted marshmallow syrup, cream, whipped cream, and marshmallow cereal.

items.name: The Elote Old Fashioned
items.desc: Mexican corn whiskey and corn liqueur cocktail, made for V.I.PASSHOLDER Summer Days.

items.name: Creamsicle Spritz & Blackberry Bourbon Bramble
items.location: Shine on Tap area, Disney Springs
items.desc: Creamsicle Spritz (non-alcoholic, orange/vanilla/Sprite) and a Maker's Mark blackberry bourbon cocktail; exclusive pint glass and squeeze-bottle keepsakes available.

items.name: Signature drink pint glass
items.desc: Limited-edition souvenir pint glass with any signature drink purchase; keyring clip also available.
